title: Enable admin users to change user status

requirements.text: Add a status change dropdown in the UserStatusManagement component that allows admins to modify user status in addition to roles

quotes: Make it so people with admin panel access can change status

acceptanceCriteria: Status dropdown is visible in the user management table
Only admins can see and use the status change controls

requirements.text: Implement backend method to update user status that can be called by admin users

quotes: Make it so people with admin panel access can change status

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a setUserStatus method that accepts principal and status
Only admin users can successfully call this method
Status changes are persisted in stable storage

requirements.text: Create useSetUserStatus React hook that wraps the backend setUserStatus method and invalidates relevant queries on success

quotes: Make it so people with admin panel access can change status

acceptanceCriteria: Hook follows the same pattern as useSetUserRole
Query invalidation refreshes the user list after status changes
Toast notifications show success or error messages

constraints: Follow the same UI patterns as the existing role management dropdown in UserStatusManagement
Do not modify authentication flow or Internet Identity integration
nonGoals: Adding new user status types beyond what currently exists
Modifying the admin panel layout or navigation
